name: property managers handling 10-20 rental properties tool
description: For property managers handling 10-20 rental properties, inconsistent tracking of KPIs causes poor decision-making. We automate KPI tracking instead of manual spreadsheets and reports.
problem_solved: Inconsistent tracking of property management KPIs leads to poor decision-making.
features: User-friendly interface for easy data entry
